name: ETH Historical Backfill Pilot
edge_rationale: ETH strategy transfer research requires a high-quality historical dataset. This pilot validates ingestion mechanics, disk usage slope, and quality metrics on a small ETHUSDT window before any full 2022-2026 backfill.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: No trading edge is tested. The diagnostic mechanism is data feasibility under operational constraints: separate research snapshot, daily ZIP streaming, disk guard, no raw archive persistence, and no runtime database writes.
required_data: ETHUSDT daily metrics ZIP for open interest
ETHUSDT daily aggTrades ZIP aggregated into 60s and 15m buckets
ETHUSDT funding REST sample for pilot days
frozen_assumptions: No production, PAPER, LIVE, runtime, core, execution, orchestrator, or settings changes.
Output must be a separate SQLite database under research_lab/snapshots.
The script must refuse runtime storage paths.
Disk guard must block if free space drops below the configured threshold.
Raw ZIP/CSV archives are not persisted.
ETH strategy backtest is out of scope until full backfill dataset is audited.
expected_observation: A successful pilot creates a small ETHUSDT research snapshot, reports row counts versus expected counts, measures DB size per day, estimates full 2022-2026 storage footprint, and leaves production runtime untouched.

kill_criteria.disk_guard_triggered: Abort rather than continue if free disk is below threshold.
kill_criteria.runtime_db_path: Any attempt to write to storage/btc_bot.db or runtime storage invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.raw_archive_persistence: Persisting raw ZIP/CSV archives invalidates the pilot.
kill_criteria.quality_failure: Material candle or aggtrade gaps block full backfill planning.
kill_criteria.runtime_change: Any runtime/core/settings change invalidates the milestone.

failure_modes: Daily aggTrades archives are too large for available disk/network if not streamed.
Pilot days are clean but older historical days may have archive schema drift.
Funding REST is available for recent pilot days but full historical funding needs separate pagination.
Linear DB size estimate understates peak temporary memory or download pressure.
out_of_scope: Keeping raw ZIP or CSV archives.
author: Codex
